response:
Blank, the living room LED function is $L(t) = \max\left(0, 500 - \left(300 + 200\sin\left(\frac{\pi}{12}t\right)\right)\right)$.  
Blank, this simplifies to $L(t) = \max\left(0, 200 - 200\sin\left(\frac{\pi}{12}t\right)\right)$.  
Blank, energy is zero when natural light exceeds five hundred lumens.  
Blank, integration over twenty-four hours yields two hundred point zero watt-hours.  
Blank, the bedroom requires integer solutions for $0.3r + 0.6g + 0.1b = 500$.  
Blank, valid combinations exist where $r, g, b$ are between zero and two hundred fifty-five.  
Blank, any set satisfying the equation is acceptable for the design.  
Blank, no adjacent words start with consecutive letters in this text.  
Blank, the first word of each sentence is the word blank.
